name: reregulation-registry
title: U.S. Legal Services Reregulation Provider Registry
description: Open, reproducible, longitudinal registry of every authorized provider operating under a U.S. legal-services reregulation program: Alternative Business Structures (ABS), regulatory sandboxes, and allied-legal-professional / paraprofessional licenses. v1.0.2 covers 10 programs across 7 states with 708 providers, entry/exit event tracking, and full provenance. No harm analysis — just the spine. This dataset publishes only public-record information: every provider record is drawn from public regulatory rosters and official program-status pages published by each program's own regulator, never from private, non-public, or interaction-derived data.

sources.title: Utah Office of Legal Services Innovation — Sandbox roster
WSBA — LLLT directory (sunset program; Wayback archive)
Colorado Office of Attorney Regulation Counsel — LLP roster
Utah Courts — Licensed Paralegal Practitioner directory

fields.name: program_id
fields.description: Stable opaque primary key, e.g. prog_az_abs.

fields.name: jurisdiction
fields.description: USPS two-letter state/territory code, uppercase.

fields.name: program_name
fields.description: Full human-readable program name.

fields.name: program_type
fields.description: Kind of reregulation program.

fields.name: regulator
fields.description: Name of the regulating body.

fields.name: regulator_url
fields.description: Landing page URL of the regulator.

fields.name: authorizing_rule
fields.description: Canonical citation, e.g. ACJA §7-210 or APR 28.

fields.name: launch_date
fields.description: Date the program first issued authorizations. NULL if unknown.

fields.name: program_status
fields.description: Operational state of the program itself (not individual providers).

fields.name: sunset_date
fields.description: Effective end date for sunset programs; anticipated launch for proposed programs.

fields.name: allows_nonlawyer_ownership
fields.description: True if non-lawyers may hold equity in a licensed entity (Rule 5.4 relief).

fields.name: allows_upl_waiver
fields.description: True if providers may engage in acts that would otherwise constitute UPL.

fields.name: allows_software_provider
fields.description: True if software platforms may be licensed as providers (AI-relevant).

fields.name: source_url
fields.description: URL of the source document for this row.

fields.name: retrieved_at
fields.description: UTC timestamp of the scrape that produced this row.

fields.name: scraper_version
fields.description: Semantic version of the scraper.

fields.name: snapshot_id
fields.description: Content-addressed PK: snap_<sha256[:16]>.

fields.name: program_id
fields.description: FK → program.

fields.name: source_url
fields.description: Canonical URL that was fetched.

fields.name: retrieved_at
fields.description: UTC fetch time. For Wayback captures, the archive timestamp.

fields.name: content_sha256
fields.description: SHA-256 of raw bytes (lowercase hex). Dedup key.

fields.name: storage_path
fields.description: Relative path to blob in data/raw/.

fields.name: media_type
fields.description: Format of the raw capture.

fields.name: scraper_version
fields.description: Scraper version; wayback-* for archive captures.

fields.name: provider_id
fields.description: Deterministic PK: prov_{program_slug}_{sha256(program_id+legal_name)[:12]}.

fields.name: program_id
fields.description: FK → program.

fields.name: provider_type
fields.description: Entity (organization) or individual practitioner.

fields.name: legal_name
fields.description: Legal name exactly as it appears on the regulatory roster.

fields.name: normalized_name
fields.description: Deterministic normalized form for entity resolution (see methodology.md §3).

fields.name: jurisdiction
fields.description: USPS two-letter state code where the provider is licensed.

fields.name: authorization_date
fields.description: First authorized date from the roster, if published.

fields.name: current_status
fields.description: COMPUTED from provider_status_event log. Never scraped directly.

fields.name: practice_areas_raw
fields.description: JSON array of practice areas in the source's own terminology, e.g. ["family law","civil"]. Empty string if none published.

fields.name: practice_areas_list
fields.description: JSON array of JusticeBench LIST taxonomy codes. Empty string if mapping not yet applied.

fields.name: ownership_structure
fields.description: JSON object with lawyer/non-lawyer ownership percentages and capital source. Entities only; null for individuals.

fields.name: uses_technology
fields.description: True if provider describes technology-assisted service delivery. Null if unknown.

fields.name: uses_ai
fields.description: True if provider describes AI or LLM use. Null if unknown. The column connecting to the UPL/AI policy question.

fields.name: website
fields.description: Provider public website URL. Null if unknown.

fields.name: first_seen_snapshot_id
fields.description: FK → source_snapshot. Earliest snapshot in which this provider appeared.

fields.name: last_seen_snapshot_id
fields.description: FK → source_snapshot. Most recent snapshot in which this provider appeared.

fields.name: source_url
fields.description: URL of the snapshot that last updated this row.

fields.name: retrieved_at
fields.description: retrieved_at of the snapshot that last updated this row.

fields.name: scraper_version
fields.description: Scraper version that last wrote this row.

fields.name: event_id
fields.description: Deterministic PK: evt_+sha256(provider_id:snapshot_id:event_type)[:24]. Idempotent across re-runs.

fields.name: provider_id
fields.description: FK → provider.

fields.name: event_date
fields.description: Date the change was first OBSERVED (snapshot date), not when it occurred.

fields.name: event_type
fields.description: What kind of change this event documents. disappeared_from_roster ≠ revoked — see methodology.md §4c.

fields.name: new_status
fields.description: Provider current_status after this event.

fields.name: detail
fields.description: Free text. For status_change: 'old → new'. For disciplined/reinstated: description from discipline source.

fields.name: source_snapshot_id
fields.description: FK → source_snapshot. The capture that revealed this change.

fields.name: source_url
fields.description: Provenance URL.

fields.name: retrieved_at
fields.description: Provenance timestamp (UTC).

fields.name: scraper_version
fields.description: Scraper version.

fields.name: provider_id
fields.description: FK → provider.

fields.name: alias_name
fields.description: DBA name, former legal name, or brand name.

fields.name: alias_source
fields.description: Where the alias was found.

fields.name: source_url
fields.description: Provenance.

fields.name: retrieved_at
fields.description: Provenance (UTC).

fields.name: scraper_version
fields.description: Provenance.

fields.name: provider_id
fields.description: FK → provider.

fields.name: cl_docket_id
fields.description: CourtListener docket ID.

fields.name: cl_party_id
fields.description: CourtListener party ID. Null if not resolved.

fields.name: match_score
fields.description: Composite match confidence 0.0–1.0.

fields.name: match_method
fields.description: How the match was produced.

fields.name: verified
fields.description: True if a human confirmed the match. Verified rows are never overwritten by automated pipeline runs.

fields.name: reviewer
fields.description: Identifier of the reviewer. Null if unverified.

fields.name: reviewed_at
fields.description: When verification was recorded (UTC).
